entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating spot, futures, launchpad, earn, and related services under the Coinstore brand; current first-party materials verify active operation but do not clearly establish a precise launch date or corporate domicile beyond the existing 2021 and Singapore markers.
entity.notes: This is a status-only reviewed bundle. The existing 2021 launch and Singapore origin are retained because accessible first-party materials did not provide a stronger historical or legal-entity statement. Current service-restriction materials include Singapore among restricted jurisdictions, which is not by itself sufficient to rewrite corporate origin.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2021 and still operating under the Coinstore brand.

evidence.title: Coinstore official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current spot, futures, launchpad, earn, and related exchange services.

evidence.title: Coinstore spot trading platform
evidence.notes: The official trading interface corroborates active centralized exchange operation. It does not independently establish a precise founding date or domicile.
